---
title: "Room_analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# loading libraries
install.packages("rjson")
install.packages("jsonlite")
library(tidyverse)
library(rjson)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(jsonlite)
library(sf)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(grid)
library(tibble)
```

```{r}
# not using CRS
sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)
drop_crs <- function(x) {
  st_crs(x) <- NA
  x
}

# loading trajectory data and drop CRS
geo_trajectories <- st_read("data/all_trajectories_with_floor.geojson")
geo_trajectories$floorNumber <- as.integer(geo_trajectories$floorNumber)
geo_trajectories <- drop_crs(geo_trajectories)

#room plan and drop CRS
floor_0_plan_sf <- st_read("data/geojson_converted_objects/floor_0_all_objects.geojson")
floor_1_plan_sf <- st_read("data/geojson_converted_objects/floor_1_all_objects.geojson")
floor_2_plan_sf <- st_read("data/geojson_converted_objects/floor_2_all_objects.geojson")
floor_0_plan_sf <- drop_crs(floor_0_plan_sf)
floor_1_plan_sf <- drop_crs(floor_1_plan_sf)
floor_2_plan_sf <- drop_crs(floor_2_plan_sf)

#room plan - polygons and drop CRS
floor_0_rooms <- st_read("data/polygons/polygons_floor_0.geojson")
floor_1_rooms <- st_read("data/polygons/polygons_floor_1.geojson")
floor_2_rooms <- st_read("data/polygons/polygons_floor_2.geojson")
floor_0_rooms <- drop_crs(floor_0_rooms)
floor_1_rooms <- drop_crs(floor_1_rooms)
floor_2_rooms <- drop_crs(floor_2_rooms)

#renaming columns
floor_0_rooms <- floor_0_rooms %>% select(room_id, geometry)
floor_1_rooms <- floor_1_rooms %>% mutate(room_id = floor_plan)
floor_1_rooms <- floor_1_rooms %>% select(room_id, geometry)
floor_2_rooms <- floor_2_rooms %>% mutate(room_id = fid)
floor_2_rooms <- floor_2_rooms %>% select(room_id, geometry)

#trajectories based on floor
trajectory_f00 <- geo_trajectories %>% 
  dplyr::filter(.data$floorNumber == 0)
trajectory_f01 <- geo_trajectories %>% 
  dplyr::filter(.data$floorNumber == 1)
trajectory_f02 <- geo_trajectories %>% 
  dplyr::filter(.data$floorNumber == 2)
```


```{r}
#combine trajectories with rooms for each floor
trajectory_f00_rooms <- st_join(
  trajectory_f00,
  floor_0_rooms %>% select(room_id),
  join = st_covered_by,
  left = TRUE
)

trajectory_f01_rooms <- st_join(
  trajectory_f01,
  floor_1_rooms %>% select(room_id),
  join = st_covered_by,
  left = TRUE
)

trajectory_f02_rooms <- st_join(
  trajectory_f02,
  floor_2_rooms %>% select(room_id),
  join = st_covered_by,
  left = TRUE
)

#merge the floors together
trajectories_with_rooms <- bind_rows(
  trajectory_f00_rooms,
  trajectory_f01_rooms,
  trajectory_f02_rooms
)
```

```{r}
# check how many points did not get assigned a room - it is around 1.3 percent
trajectories_with_rooms %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  summarise(
    total_points = n(),
    missing_room = sum(is.na(room_id)),
    missing_room_pct = mean(is.na(room_id)) * 100
  )
```
```{r}
# making room sequences
room_sequences <- trajectories_with_rooms %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  arrange(id, timestamp) %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  mutate(
    previous_room = lag(room_id),
    room_change = room_id != previous_room | is.na(previous_room)
  ) %>%
  filter(room_change) %>%
  summarise(
    room_sequence = paste(room_id, collapse = " -> "),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

trajectories_with_rooms <- trajectories_with_rooms %>%
  mutate(timestamp = as.numeric(timestamp))

# making room episodes
room_episodes <- trajectories_with_rooms %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  arrange(id, timestamp) %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  mutate(
    room_change = room_id != lag(room_id, default = first(room_id)),
    episode_id = cumsum(room_change)
  ) %>%
  group_by(id, episode_id, floorNumber, room_id) %>%
  summarise(
    entry_time = min(timestamp),
    exit_time = max(timestamp),
    duration_sec = as.numeric(difftime(max(timestamp), min(timestamp), units = "secs")) + 2,
    n_points = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# making room transitions
room_transitions <- room_episodes %>%
  arrange(id, episode_id) %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  mutate(
    from_room = room_id,
    to_room = lead(room_id),
    from_floor = floorNumber,
    to_floor = lead(floorNumber),
    transition_order = row_number()
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(to_room)) %>%
  ungroup()

transition_counts <- room_transitions %>%
  count(from_floor, from_room, to_floor, to_room, sort = TRUE)

transition_counts
```

```{r}
rooms_all <- bind_rows(
  floor_0_rooms %>% mutate(floorNumber = 0),
  floor_1_rooms %>% mutate(floorNumber = 1),
  floor_2_rooms %>% mutate(floorNumber = 2)
) %>%
  mutate(
    floorNumber = as.integer(floorNumber),
    room_id = as.character(room_id)
  ) %>%
  st_make_valid()

room_nodes_sf <- rooms_all %>%
  mutate(geometry = st_point_on_surface(geometry))

coords <- st_coordinates(room_nodes_sf)

room_nodes <- room_nodes_sf %>%
  mutate(
    x = coords[, 1],
    y = coords[, 2]
  ) %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(floorNumber, room_id, x, y)
```

```{r}
# ---------- observed directed transitions ----------

edges_directed <- transition_counts %>%
  filter(from_floor == to_floor) %>%
  transmute(
    floorNumber = as.integer(from_floor),
    from_room = as.character(from_room),
    to_room = as.character(to_room),
    transition_count = n
  )
```

```{r}
# ---------- physical adjacency constraints ----------

make_floor_adjacency <- function(rooms_all, floor_no, min_shared_length = 0.01) {
  
  rooms_floor <- rooms_all %>%
    filter(floorNumber == floor_no) %>%
    st_make_valid()
  
  room_ids <- rooms_floor$room_id
  geoms <- st_geometry(rooms_floor)
  
  pairs <- combn(seq_along(room_ids), 2, simplify = FALSE)
  
  map_dfr(pairs, function(pair) {
    i <- pair[1]
    j <- pair[2]
    
    shared_boundary <- suppressWarnings(
      st_intersection(st_boundary(geoms[i]), st_boundary(geoms[j]))
    )
    
    shared_length <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(st_length(shared_boundary)))
    
    if (
      length(shared_length) == 0 ||
      is.na(shared_length) ||
      shared_length <= min_shared_length
    ) {
      return(NULL)
    }
    
    tibble(
      floorNumber = floor_no,
      room_a = pmin(room_ids[i], room_ids[j]),
      room_b = pmax(room_ids[i], room_ids[j]),
      shared_length = shared_length
    )
  })
}

blocked_pairs <- tibble::tribble(
  ~floorNumber, ~room_a, ~room_b,
  0, "13", "16",
  0, "11", "15"
)

allowed_pairs <- map_dfr(
  sort(unique(rooms_all$floorNumber)),
  ~ make_floor_adjacency(rooms_all, .x)
) %>%
  anti_join(blocked_pairs, by = c("floorNumber", "room_a", "room_b")) %>%
  distinct(floorNumber, room_a, room_b, shared_length)
```

```{r}
# ---------- check and filter observed edges ----------

edges_directed_checked <- edges_directed %>%
  mutate(
    room_a = pmin(from_room, to_room),
    room_b = pmax(from_room, to_room)
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    allowed_pairs %>%
      mutate(is_physically_possible = TRUE),
    by = c("floorNumber", "room_a", "room_b")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    is_physically_possible = replace_na(is_physically_possible, FALSE)
  )

edges_directed_valid <- edges_directed_checked %>%
  filter(is_physically_possible) %>%
  select(floorNumber, from_room, to_room, transition_count)
```

```{r}
# ---------- check how many were dropped ----------
dropped_by_floor <- edges_directed_checked %>%
  group_by(floorNumber) %>%
  summarise(
    total_transitions = sum(transition_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    dropped_transitions = sum(transition_count[!is_physically_possible], na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_dropped = dropped_transitions / total_transitions * 100,
    dropped_edge_rows = sum(!is_physically_possible),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

dropped_by_floor
sum(!edges_directed_checked$is_physically_possible)
sum(edges_directed_checked$is_physically_possible)

dropped_edges <- edges_directed_checked %>%
  filter(!is_physically_possible) %>%
  
dropped_edges
sum(edges_directed_checked$transition_count[!edges_directed_checked$is_physically_possible], na.rm = TRUE)

sum(edges_directed_checked$transition_count[edges_directed_checked$is_physically_possible], na.rm = TRUE)

# removed 305 observation transitions (2096 remain)
# removed 39 edges (104 remain), so 39 impossible types of transitions - these were present 305 times
```


```{r}
# ---------- node metrics ----------

node_time <- room_episodes %>%
  mutate(
    floorNumber = as.integer(floorNumber),
    room_id = as.character(room_id)
  ) %>%
  group_by(floorNumber, room_id) %>%
  summarise(
    total_time_sec = sum(duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    unique_visitors = n_distinct(id),
    n_visits = n(),
    mean_duration_sec = mean(duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

node_transition_importance <- bind_rows(
  edges_directed_valid %>%
    transmute(
      floorNumber,
      room_id = from_room,
      out_transitions = transition_count,
      in_transitions = 0
    ),
  edges_directed_valid %>%
    transmute(
      floorNumber,
      room_id = to_room,
      out_transitions = 0,
      in_transitions = transition_count
    )
) %>%
  group_by(floorNumber, room_id) %>%
  summarise(
    in_transitions = sum(in_transitions),
    out_transitions = sum(out_transitions),
    total_transitions = in_transitions + out_transitions,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
minmax <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x)) || length(unique(na.omit(x))) <= 1) {
    return(rep(0.5, length(x)))
  }
  scales::rescale(x, to = c(0, 1), na.rm = TRUE)
}

nodes <- room_nodes %>%
  left_join(node_time, by = c("floorNumber", "room_id")) %>%
  left_join(node_transition_importance, by = c("floorNumber", "room_id")) %>%
  replace_na(list(
    total_time_sec = 0,
    unique_visitors = 0,
    n_visits = 0,
    mean_duration_sec = 0,
    in_transitions = 0,
    out_transitions = 0,
    total_transitions = 0
  )) %>%
  group_by(floorNumber) %>%
  mutate(
    dwell_norm = minmax(total_time_sec),
    visitor_norm = minmax(unique_visitors),
    transition_norm = minmax(total_transitions),
    importance_score = 0.5 * dwell_norm +
      0.25 * visitor_norm +
      0.25 * transition_norm
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# ---------- helper for adding edge coordinates ----------
add_edge_coords <- function(edges, from_col, to_col, nodes) {
  edges %>%
    left_join(
      nodes %>% select(floorNumber, room_id, x_from = x, y_from = y),
      by = c("floorNumber", setNames("room_id", from_col))
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      nodes %>% select(floorNumber, room_id, x_to = x, y_to = y),
      by = c("floorNumber", setNames("room_id", to_col))
    ) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(x_from),
      !is.na(y_from),
      !is.na(x_to),
      !is.na(y_to)
    )
}

edges_directed_xy_valid <- edges_directed_valid %>%
  add_edge_coords(
    from_col = "from_room",
    to_col = "to_room",
    nodes = room_nodes
  )

edges_undirected_valid <- edges_directed_valid %>%
  mutate(
    room_a = pmin(from_room, to_room),
    room_b = pmax(from_room, to_room)
  ) %>%
  group_by(floorNumber, room_a, room_b) %>%
  summarise(
    transition_count = sum(transition_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(room_a != room_b)

edges_undirected_xy_valid <- edges_undirected_valid %>%
  add_edge_coords(
    from_col = "room_a",
    to_col = "room_b",
    nodes = room_nodes
  )
```


```{r}
# overview of floor plans for visualization, we create a list of the floor plan spatial data frames for each floor, which allows us to easily access and plot the floor plans in our network visualizations. This is important for providing context to the room transition networks and understanding how the rooms are arranged within the building.
floor_plans <- list(
  `0` = floor_0_plan_sf,
  `1` = floor_1_plan_sf,
  `2` = floor_2_plan_sf
)
```

```{r}
# plotting function
plot_room_network <- function(
    floor_no,
    directed = FALSE,
    node_metric = "importance_score",
    top_edges = 15,
    label_top_n = 8
) {
  
  floor_no <- as.integer(floor_no)
  
  plan_floor <- floor_plans[[as.character(floor_no)]]
  
  rooms_floor <- rooms_all %>%
    filter(floorNumber == floor_no)
  
  nodes_floor <- nodes %>%
    filter(floorNumber == floor_no)
  
  label_nodes <- nodes_floor %>%
    arrange(desc(.data[[node_metric]])) %>%
    slice_head(n = label_top_n)
  
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(
      data = plan_floor,
      fill = NA,
      colour = "grey80",
      linewidth = 0.3
    ) +
    geom_sf(
      data = rooms_floor,
      fill = NA,
      colour = "grey55",
      linewidth = 0.4
    )
  
  if (directed) {
  
  node_buffer <- 0.1  # increase if arrows still enter nodes, decrease if too far away
  
  edges_floor <- edges_directed_xy_valid %>%
    filter(floorNumber == floor_no) %>%
    arrange(desc(transition_count)) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_edges) %>%
    mutate(
      dx = x_to - x_from,
      dy = y_to - y_from,
      edge_len = sqrt(dx^2 + dy^2)
    ) %>%
    filter(edge_len > 0) %>%
    mutate(
      # start slightly after source node
      x_from_plot = x_from + node_buffer * dx / edge_len,
      y_from_plot = y_from + node_buffer * dy / edge_len,
      
      # end slightly before target node
      x_to_plot = x_to - node_buffer * dx / edge_len,
      y_to_plot = y_to - node_buffer * dy / edge_len
    )
  
  p <- p +
    geom_curve(
      data = edges_floor,
      aes(
        x = x_from_plot,
        y = y_from_plot,
        xend = x_to_plot,
        yend = y_to_plot,
        colour = transition_count
      ),
      linewidth = 0.6,
      curvature = 0.15,
      alpha = 0.85,
      lineend = "round",
      arrow = arrow(
        length = unit(0.16, "inches"),
        type = "closed"
      )
    ) +
    scale_colour_gradient(
      low = "lightblue",
      high = "darkblue",
      name = "Transitions"
      )
}
   else {
    
    edges_floor <- edges_undirected_xy_valid %>%
      filter(floorNumber == floor_no)
    
    p <- p +
      geom_segment(
        data = edges_floor,
        aes(
          x = x_from,
          y = y_from,
          xend = x_to,
          yend = y_to,
          linewidth = transition_count
        ),
        alpha = 0.55
      )
  }
  
  p +
    geom_point(
      data = nodes_floor,
      aes(
        x = x,
        y = y,
        size = .data[[node_metric]],
        color = .data[[node_metric]]
      ),
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = label_nodes,
      aes(
        x = x,
        y = y,
        label = room_id
      ),
      size = 3,
      vjust = -1
    ) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 11)) +
    scale_linewidth_continuous(range = c(0.2, 2.5)) +
    coord_sf() +
    theme_void() +
    labs(
      title = paste0(
        "Room transition network, floor ",
        floor_no,
        ifelse(directed, " directed", " undirected")
      ),
      size = node_metric,
      linewidth = "Transition count"
    )
}
```

```{r}
plot_room_network(
  floor_no = 0,
  directed = FALSE,
  node_metric = "importance_score"
)

plot_room_network(
  floor_no = 1,
  directed = FALSE,
  node_metric = "importance_score"
)

plot_room_network(
  floor_no = 2,
  directed = FALSE,
  node_metric = "importance_score"
)
```

```{r}
plot_room_network(
  floor_no = 0,
  directed = TRUE,
  node_metric = "importance_score",
  top_edges = 15
)

plot_room_network(
  floor_no = 1,
  directed = TRUE,
  node_metric = "importance_score",
  top_edges = 15
)

plot_room_network(
  floor_no = 2,
  directed = TRUE,
  node_metric = "importance_score",
  top_edges = 15
)
```


# RQ: Room hubs and if more time is more spent stopping / transitioning in certain rooms
```{r}
# getting max number of transition nodes to find the centroids potentially
nodes %>%
  group_by(floorNumber) %>%
  slice_max(total_transitions, n = 3) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(floorNumber, room_id, total_transitions, x, y)

# getting rooms with most dwell time
nodes %>%
  group_by(floorNumber) %>%
  slice_max(total_time_sec, n = 3) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(floorNumber, room_id, total_time_sec, x, y)

# getting rooms with largest dwell time on average
nodes %>%
  group_by(floorNumber) %>%
  slice_max(mean_duration_sec, n = 3) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(floorNumber, room_id, mean_duration_sec, x, y)
```


```{r}
branching_points <- edges_directed_valid %>%
  group_by(floorNumber, from_room) %>%
  mutate(
    total_from_room = sum(transition_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_transition = transition_count / total_from_room
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_next_rooms = n_distinct(to_room),
    dominant_next_room = to_room[which.max(transition_count)],
    dominant_share = max(p_transition, na.rm = TRUE),
    transition_entropy = -sum(p_transition * log2(p_transition), na.rm = TRUE),
    total_transitions = sum(transition_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(floorNumber, desc(transition_entropy))

branching_points

#high dominant_share = most visitors follow same next-room route
#high transition_entropy = visitors split into different routes
#high n_next_rooms = room functions as a branching point
```

```{r}
floor_route_structure <- branching_points %>%
  group_by(floorNumber) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_dominant_share = mean(dominant_share, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_transition_entropy = mean(transition_entropy, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_next_rooms = mean(n_next_rooms, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_branching_rooms = sum(n_next_rooms > 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

floor_route_structure

#high mean_dominant_share	floor produces similar routes
#high mean_transition_entropy	floor allows diverse exploration
#many n_branching_rooms	floor has many decision points
```


```{r}
visitor_transitions <- room_episodes %>%
  mutate(
    floorNumber = as.integer(floorNumber),
    room_id = as.character(room_id)
  ) %>%
  arrange(id, episode_id) %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  mutate(
    from_room = room_id,
    to_room = lead(room_id),
    from_floor = floorNumber,
    to_floor = lead(floorNumber),
    transition_order = row_number()
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(to_room),
    from_floor == to_floor
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    id,
    floorNumber = from_floor,
    transition_order,
    from_room,
    to_room
  )

visitor_transitions_valid <- visitor_transitions %>%
  mutate(
    room_a = pmin(from_room, to_room),
    room_b = pmax(from_room, to_room)
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    allowed_pairs %>% select(floorNumber, room_a, room_b),
    by = c("floorNumber", "room_a", "room_b")
  )

edge_popularity <- edges_directed_valid %>%
  group_by(floorNumber) %>%
  mutate(
    transition_share = transition_count / sum(transition_count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

route_conformity <- visitor_transitions_valid %>%
  left_join(
    edge_popularity,
    by = c("floorNumber", "from_room", "to_room")
  ) %>%
  group_by(id, floorNumber) %>%
  summarise(
    route_conformity = mean(transition_share, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_valid_transitions = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

route_conformity 
```
